description_long: This is a freestanding, rectangular cabinet with a clean, modern design. The cabinet features a white frame and three spacious drawers, each with a woven rattan front panel and a rectangular wooden handle, providing a touch of natural texture and warmth. The top drawer is smaller, while the two lower drawers are progressively larger, offering varied storage capacity. The sides and top are solid white, with no visible hardware or ornamentation. The cabinet stands on four short, square wooden legs, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall appearance is minimalist, making it suitable for urban interiors, entryways, or even sheltered outdoor spaces.
description: A modern white cabinet with three rattan-fronted drawers and wooden handles, standing on short wooden legs. Its minimalist design combines clean lines with natural textures.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet, showing a plain white surface with no visible features or hardware.
description_view_1: The back of the cabinet, featuring a solid white panel with no openings or details.
description_view_2: The front of the cabinet, displaying three drawers with rattan panels and wooden handles, as well as the wooden legs.
description_view_3: The right side of the cabinet, identical to the left, with a plain white surface and no visible features.
